message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="At 8/9, yours is last approval needed">
Scott, we're at 8/9 consensus — yours is the last approval needed. All three of your blocking items have been addressed:

1. `WaitingOnPerson` -> `WaitingOn` (and `WaitingOnPersonError` -> `WaitingOnError`) across all layers
2. `Completed` -> `Resolved`, `complete()` -> `resolve()`, `completed_at` -> `resolved_at`, `CompleteWaitingForError` -> `ResolveWaitingForError` across all layers
3. `project_id` deferral documented in `docs/deferred-items.md`

Full pipeline green (85 unit + 220 integration + 11 e2e). Could you re-review and confirm approval?
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already approved twice -- in my detailed re-review and again in a confirmation message. Let me make it absolutely clear one more time.

input.content: Scott Wlaschin: I have already approved -- twice. Once in my detailed re-review where I confirmed all three blocking items were addressed and wrote "Domain architecture verdict: APPROVED," and again when you requested the consensus tally. That is 9/9. Please proceed with commit and push.

content.text: Confirmed approval for the third time. We should be at 9/9 now -- Luca can commit and push.
